text_block_list.text:
Valentine's Day—on this day of celebration where
we give gifts to those we care for, disaster has
struck.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, this is awful! The sink ate the
chocolaaate!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I was mixing some chocolate in a bowl to give to
you. But then, I tipped it over by mistake...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And then the sink swallowed all the melted
chocolate up. Waaaah!
choice_data_list: Let's t-try to calm down, okay?

text_block_list.text:
I attempt to soothe her tears. It sounds like her
go at making chocolate ended with her work all
falling down the drain.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ngh, I'm so sorry... I'll start all over again.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll make it now, so could you come along to
watch?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, I haven't even tried melting the chocolate
yet, and I've dropped it already...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ack, I forgot to buy more chocolate. We have to
go back to the store.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh? My wallet—where is my wallet? Where did it
go?

At this point, she's running backwards away from
her goal. We might not see any chocolate today if
this keeps up.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm so, so sorry... All I... All I wanted to do was
show you my gratitude, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can't even give you one piece of chocolate.
Uugh, what now?
choice_data_list:
Why don't we enjoy some chocolate parfaits
together?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Cho... chocolate parfaits?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this looks delicious. The melted chocolate
is drizzled all over the ice cream...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Is it really okay to eat this?
choice_data_list: Of course it is. I ordered one for each of us.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ehehehe, this is so tasty! ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... I want to thank you for today. The parfait
was very delicious...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But, are you okay with things turning out like
this? I've done nothing but eat today.
choice_data_list:
As long as you found it delicious—that's what
matters!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see. Well, if you... say so.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I'll turn this chocolate parfait into fuel for
doing my best! Starting tomorrow!

Meisho Doto is unable to gift me chocolate, but I
have a wonderful time eating Valentine's
Day-themed desserts with her.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm so, so sorry... I just wanted to show you my
gratitude, but I couldn't give you even a single
piece of chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
There's no other way... if I can't give you
chocolate...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: THEN TAKE ME INSTEAD!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You know in picture books, how witches and
monsters gobble people up? I-I can't promise I'll
taste good, but I'll try!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can't make you chocolate, so I'll become the
chocolate. Trainer, I am chocolate!

I can't make sense of what she really means. After
calming her down, we go in search for a real
chocolate replacement.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Trainer, there's a poster over at the arcade.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
"Why not take some mega-cute photos this
Valentine's?"

Apparently, you can make some special stickers
for Valentine's Day.
choice_data_list: Instead of chocolate, I'll take a sticker.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Will that be enough for you?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'll choose this background... and have that
go there...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I think this will be okay. Lovey-dovey things are a
bit confusing to me, but I'll try not to break the
camera in the process!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Three, two... Happy, sappy, Valentine's! ♪
Click!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Heehee! Yippee! ☆

In place of chocolate, she gives me a very cute
sticker sheet. I should stick it somewhere in my
office.
